titleStmt.title: SII 24.419: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 419. (A.R. No. 318 of 1950-51.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL OF THE SĒṈAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE.

summary.p: Fragmentary. Records an endowment of land by Chinna-Tirumalayyadēva-Mahārāja, son of Salakkayyadēva-Mahārāja, his wife, Tippamma, Akkāchchi-Amma, sister of Tirumala and Kōnammaṉ (see. Nos. 323 and 324 of 1950-51) for conducting the Kṛishṇarāyar-tirunāḷ and other specified festivals to the god. The gift lands lay in the villages of Mēlaimuṟi-Śēdaṉkuḍi in Maḻa-nāḍu and Uṟaiyūr in Teṉkarai-Rājagambhīra-vaḷanāḍu •• The details of the date viz., Śaka 1456, Jaya, Mīṉa, śu. Paurṇamī, Friday, [Hastā] regularly correspond to 1535 A.D., March 19, ·51; ·64.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pratāpa śrīvīra Accutadevamahārāyar prathuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 6 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa jayasamvatsarattu mīnnāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pūrṇaiyum śukravāramumA portion of the inscription at the beginning and perhaps at the end also is lost.
nivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvarāvīti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganātha devar śrīpaṇṭārattukku calakkaiya devamahārājāvin putran ciṉṉattirumalai mahārājāvin deviyār tippammaṉum
koṉammaṉum rājāvin Uṭappiṟantāḷ Akkācci Ammaṉum dharmmaśilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevaṟku tippammaṉ toppukku kṛṣṇarāyar tirunāḷ Iraṇṭān tirunā
ṭattaḷikai 5 10 . veccavamutu kūṉ . 50 periamutu 5 100 . Atirasam paṭi . 1 . kku Atirasam 3 100 6 . vaṭai paṭi . 1 . kku cukiyaṉ Aṭaik kāy Amutu 2 1000 Ilaiamu
kku neyamutu Uḷpaṭṭavakai l Āka rūpāy cettavaṭakarai maḻanāṭu melaicetaṉkuṭiyil Āyaṅkārkaiyil koṇṭu cetta Iṟācavipāṭanāl rūpāy 1- li I Intat tirunāḷ muṉṟām tirunāḷ
ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷaitaḷikai 5 10 3 4 Amutu kūṉ 5 10 . poriamutu 5 100 . Atirasam paṭi 6kku Atirasam 3 100 6 . vaṭai 6kku cukiyaṉ paṭi 6 . kku cukiyaṉ Aṭaikkāyamutu 2 100 Ilaiyamutu 3 1000 cantanappa
ḷpaṭṭa Inta vakaic celavukkuc cetta teṉkarai Irājakempīra vaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūril Ayyaṅkār kaiyil koṇṭu cetta Irācavipāṭaṉāl rūpāy 1 Āti brahmāliṉ tirunāḷ viṭāy
ppukku Eḻuntaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷiya kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa taḷikai 5 10 veccaamutu kūṉ 5 10 . poriamutu . 5 100 Adirasam paṭi . kku Adirasam . 3 100 1 . vaṭai paṭi 6 3 100 6 . cukiyaṉ paṭi 6kku cukiya
npaṭi 1- tirukkuttumaṇi viḷakkukku pantattukkum neyamutu Uḷppaṭṭa Intavakaic celavukkuc cettavaṭakarai maḻanāṭu melaimuṟicetaṉkuṭiyil Ayaṅkār kaiyil koṇṭu ce
ḷukku Eḻuntaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa toppu muṉṟukkum Eḻuntaruḷi Amutuceytaruḷu kiṟa taḷikai tiruppaṇiāram kaṟiamutu neyamutu Uḷppaṭṭa palavakaic celavukku koṇṭu cetta cetaṉ
ṉāl rūpāy 3- li Itu Iṟācavipāṭaṉāl nila muveliyum perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrīpaṇṭārattile tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam(ā) Ākap paṟṟuk kaṭṭikkoṇṭu tiruccervai rūpāy lai muveliyil §
Intat toppu 3 kkum perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar Eḻuntaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa Inta vakaippaṭi celavu Uṇ śrīpaṇṭārat tile viṭṭu Āca
A portion of the inscription at the beginning and perhaps at the end also is lost• This and the following three lines are engraved on the tiers of the wall. toppuk kaṭṭaḷaikku Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa vakaikku viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu tippammaṉ toppukkaṭṭaḷai [2 10] tirumalai
badly damaged koṉammaṉtoppu kaṭṭa
viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu raṅkayaṅkāṟku naṭakkakkaṭava tākavum Ippaṭikku
mmaṉum ciṟukkoṉammaṉum Ippaṭikku śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikkuk koyil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.419 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
